text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer is on a mission to recreate herself
and reach a point where she can run freely. Now,
it's time to show that version of her to the world.
choice_data_list: It's finally time for your debut.
It's finally time for your debut.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I wanna run more like my real self! As best I
can, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Go out there and make your debut race a real
party! ☆ Woo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh sure, I'll try to do that t—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wait, hold up! You want me to go full party mode
out of nowhere during my debut?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Wahey-hey! You bet I do! ☆ You've gotta pump
those vibes sky-high from the get-go so you can
make your mark, y'know?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You gotta step up, Palmster! Let the world know
you're here! ☆ Go, go, gooo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I-I guess. Maybe it's better to treat this like my
first day of school and make my first impression
count.
choice_data_list:
It's still a small crowd, so it should be easier for
you to cut loose.

It's still a small crowd, so it should be easier for
you to cut loose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Thanks, Trainer. I'll head to the paddock
now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pardon the intrusion.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: We've come to wish you good luck, Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: McQueen? Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Give it all you've got. We're the only Mejiros here
today, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There're plenty of friendly faces rooting for you
out in the crowd, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Really? But who could that possibly...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Look at that banner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do look and see about ten people standing
around the paddock holding a huge banner that
says "Let's go, Mejiros!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
They're Mejiro fans! Some've had our backs for
ages now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I think I've seen them before, actually. I didn't
want to let them down then and really pushed
myself hard.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I appreciate their support and all, but now
the pressure's really on! I don't know if bringing in
the party vibes will fly with them...
choice_data_list: Why don't you try saying hi to them?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...S-sure!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
U-um, hello everyone! I-I'm pleased to be making
my official debut today and... Oh, what the hey.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hiyaaa! I'm Palmer! ♪ Mejiro Palmer! ♪ I'm gonna
set the track on fire today, fam!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm a front runner like you've never seen, not even
hills have got me beat! I...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Er, I mean, um... I hope you'll support me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The buzzing energy around her causes her
freestyling to fizzle out, but that doesn't change
the fact that she had come out of her shell a little.
